summary: Excellent recording of a masterful show with a standout Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain combo and a smoking Crazy Fingers in an unforgettable second set.
review: Both reviewers rave about this performance, calling it one of the best shows they ever saw and praising the second‑set energy, especially the rare Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain sequence and a transcendent Crazy Fingers. The tape quality is described as great, capturing the power of the live experience even though some quad‑speaker effects aren’t fully reproduced. Overall it’s a high‑energy, technically solid document of a classic Dead night.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews highlight an exceptional performance and very good recording quality; the weighting favors the show, yielding a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as great and clear; no major flaws noted, though quad‑speaker echo effects from the venue are not fully captured on tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is highlighted as a high point with spontaneous Woo moments; the Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain transition and Crazy Fingers are singled out as exceptional, giving the concert strong momentum and memorable peaks.
